untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) dynamic support/resistance zone identification with parameterized ±[THRESHOLD]% band—no indicator directly identifies SR levels; (2) 'pause behavior' detection (price closure consistency within zone for N bars)—requires multi-bar state tracking not expressible in single-bar condition syntax; (3) secondary confirmation signal (divergence detection)—divergence requires multi-bar comparison logic and MACD/RSI trend analysis beyond basic operator constraints; (4) parameterized thresholds ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]) are placeholders requiring domain-specific SR detection algorithm.
translation_notes: Attempted pragmatic translation using price_pos_20 (Donchian 20-bar position) as proxy for zone proximity and dc_upper/dc_lower as breakout boundaries. However, the core signal philosophy—treating SR as probabilistic zones with pause confirmation and secondary divergence signals—requires algorithmic SR detection and multi-bar state logic incompatible with atomic condition rules. Recommend implementing custom SR detector upstream or hybrid rule engine.
